brand_identity.name: Rocha & Barbosa Assessoria Contábil
brand_identity.description: Premium corporate tax and fiscal consulting specializing in SPED, tax reform, and TOTVS Protheus.

rules: No warm/earthy colors outside of the gold accents.
Strictly use deep blues for backgrounds and institutional sections.
Use metallic gold (#D4AF37) for thin accents, borders, icons, and primary CTAs.
Avoid purple, teal, or violet gradients completely.
Tint greys slightly with blue to match the corporate tone.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, and H3. Tracking should be tight (-0.02em). Do not use Inter or standard sans-serifs for headings.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, forms, labels, and UI elements. High legibility.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (py-24, py-32) for sections to create a premium, uncrowded feel.

grid_modes.marketing: Mode A: Asymmetrical grid (grid-cols-12) with wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Use for About and Service highlights.
grid_modes.dashboard: Mode B: Dense grid (grid-cols-3 or 4) with tight gaps (gap-4). Use for Dashboard admin and Plans.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Containers must have internal padding (p-8) when utilizing borders to prevent text collision.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A2A57]/80 with a 1px delicate bottom border of border-[#D4AF37]/20.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_light: Flat Solid: bg-white with 1px border-[#F2F2F2]. Hover state: -translate-y-1, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(10,42,87,0.08)], border-[#D4AF37]/50.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_dark: Technical Grid: bg-[#0E4A8A] with 1px border-[#D4AF37]/20. Hover state: border-[#D4AF37].
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Primary CTA: Solid Gold bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A2A57] font-semibold hover:bg-[#A67C00] transition-colors. Secondary: Outline border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10.

motion_and_interaction.transitions: Smooth and deliberate. transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Gold borders increase in opacity. Links show a gold underline that scales from left.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling to add premium weight to the page.
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Fade up and in (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y-4 to 0) staggered for bento grid items.

components.navigation: Sticky top bar. Logo on left (Playfair Display, white + gold). Links centered (Montserrat, text-sm, uppercase). CTA on right (Gold button).
components.hero: Dark mode. Background image of premium corporate office with heavy #0A2A57/80 overlay. Left-aligned H1. Dual CTAs.
components.service_cards: Bento layout. Light mode section (bg-[#F2F2F2]). Cards are white, tall, with gold icons and deep blue text.
components.diagnostic_form: Multi-step wizard using Shadcn Forms. Minimalist inputs with border-b only (no full box) for a high-end editorial feel.
components.floating_chat: Fixed bottom-right gold icon (AI Chat / WhatsApp). Hover expands to show 'Fale com um consultor'.

sections: Hero: H1 'Sua empresa pode estar pagando mais imposto do que deveria — sem perceber.', Primary CTA 'Solicitar Diagnóstico', Secondary 'Conheça os Serviços'. Dark background.
Authority/Trust: Logos of systems (TOTVS Protheus) and three pillars (SPED, Reforma Tributária).
How We Work: 3 Blocks (Diagnóstico Fiscal, Recuperação de Créditos, Estruturação/Compliance). Minimalist cards.
Mission Statement: Large typography quote, dark blue background, gold quotes.
Recent Content: 3 latest blog posts in a clean grid.
Final CTA: Dark section, gold button.

servicos.layout: Grid-based deep dive into the 3 core services. Problem -> Impact -> Solution -> CTA structure for each card.

diagnostico.layout: Two-column layout. Left: Value proposition of the diagnosis. Right: Multi-step lead capture form.

blog.layout: Editorial style. Featured post spans 2 columns. Categories as minimalist pills (SPED, Reforma Tributária, Protheus, Créditos).

base_conhecimento.layout: Library style grid. Gated content indicated by a subtle lock icon and requires email capture.

dashboard_admin.layout: Strict Mode B Grid. Sidebar navigation. Dense data tables for leads and diagnostic submissions. Minimal gold, mostly blue/grey.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use ONLY these exact image URLs. Do NOT use placeholders. Apply overlays as specified to maintain the dark blue aesthetic and ensure text contrast.

hero_background.description: Spacious contemporary office space. MUST apply bg-[#0A2A57]/80 overlay for deep blue tone.

services_section.description: Business professionals discussing documents in a modern meeting room. Use in the 'How We Work' or 'About' preview section.

data_analysis.description: Graphs depicting data analysis on paper documents. Ideal for the 'Diagnóstico Fiscal' service card or page.

office_corridor.description: Spacious and modern office corridor. Good for About page background.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='cta-diagnostico', data-testid='nav-servicos', data-testid='form-submit'.

icons.style: Use thin stroke widths (1.5 or 1) to maintain the premium, delicate gold aesthetic.
